title: Fix handling of static keyword in methods

features.name: static keyword after function declaration
features.description: Code should include a method declaration with the static keyword placed after the function/task keyword, indicating static lifetime for local variables

features.name: static keyword before function declaration
features.description: Code should include a class method with the static keyword placed before the function keyword, indicating the method itself is static (class-level, not instance-level)

features.name: automatic keyword after function with static lifetime default
features.description: Code should include a method with static keyword after function but with automatic keyword to override the default static lifetime of local variables
